description: Amazon GuardDuty announces a new capability in GuardDuty EKS Runtime Monitoring that allows you to selectively configure the EKS clusters that are to be monitored for threat detection.

featureDetails.featureDescription: Amazon GuardDuty announces a new capability in GuardDuty EKS Runtime Monitoring that allows you to selectively configure the EKS clusters that are to be monitored for threat detection.
